skills.name: lawncare
skills.description: Expert lawn care guidance for Iowa/Waverly region. Provides seasonal fertilization  schedules, aeration timing, seeding strategies, and pest management using regional  climate data. Integrates with weather APIs to make smart irrigation decisions.

skills.name: car_maintenance
skills.description: Professional-grade vehicle maintenance scheduling and execution across all vehicle systems. Covers oil changes, air filters, tire maintenance, battery service, brake maintenance, fluid checks, and preventive inspections for optimal vehicle health and safety.

skills.name: house_maintenance
skills.description: Comprehensive home maintenance covering HVAC, plumbing, electrical, structural, and appliance systems. Provides seasonal maintenance schedules, preventive care procedures, cost estimates, and safety guidelines for optimal home health and longevity.
